detail.description:
SORT YOUR WAY TO HAPPINESS 😃

Master mergers, ready those fingers and get to matching in 3…2…1! This fun sorting puzzle features colorful coins that need to be matched up in their slots and then merged together to clear the playing field, making way for more. Bright colors, simple graphics, and lots of boosters ensure that your brain can focus on what it does best: noticing patterns and finding unique ways to shuffle everything around in order to win.

MASTER THE MATCH 🧩

Simple in theory yet
